dvids.title: Vision to Victory: Purple Up Sigonella DoDEA School
dvids.desc: NAVAL AIR STATION SIGONELLA, Italy (April 15, 2026) Sigonella DoDEA Middle Hight School held a Purple Up celebration for the Month of the Military Child.
